fixed_tp_roe.description: Fixed take-profit ROE. Overrides DSL trailing stop with a fixed ROE exit.

partial_tp.description: Partial take-profit. Close N% of position at TP1, rest at TP2.

fixed_sl_roe.description: Fixed stop-loss ROE. Overrides DSL floor with a fixed ROE stop.

partial_sl.description: Partial stop-loss. Close N% of position at SL1, rest at SL2.

dsl_override.description: Override DSL parameters (phases, tiers, stagnation) for all new positions.
